raw_consumer_statement: Amex practices FRAUD. I have an unauthorized charge on my account for {$8200.00} charged to my account on XX/XX/2023. Amex refuses to suspend or even investigate the charge. They outright violate consumer rights and the law. The case is simple, I never authorized the charge and never received any goods for it. There is no signature or no delivery or order information for it. The issue is Amex. They continue to XXXX me for payment. I have over XXXX recorded calls from them demanding payment when they REFUSE to investigate this unauthorized charge. This is illegal and they MUST BE SHUT DOWN.
